title: At the Beach 海边游玩
scene: 一家人到海边度假，在沙滩上玩耍。

lines.en: Wow! The beach is so beautiful! Can I go swimming, Dad?
lines.zh: 哇！海滩好美！我可以去游泳吗，爸爸？

lines.en: Not yet. First, put on your sunscreen. The sun is very strong.
lines.zh: 还不行。先涂防晒霜。太阳很毒。

lines.en: OK, Mom, can you help me with my back?
lines.zh: 好的，妈妈，你能帮我涂后背吗？

lines.en: Sure! Now you're all set. But stay in the shallow water.
lines.zh: 当然！现在你准备好了。但要待在浅水区。

lines.en: I will! Look at all those seashells! I want to collect some!
lines.zh: 我会的！看那些贝壳！我想收集一些！

lines.en: Good idea! Let's build a sandcastle first. It'll be fun!
lines.zh: 好主意！我们先堆个沙堡吧。会很好玩的！

lines.en: Yes! I'll get the buckets and the spade!
I'll take some photos of you building the castle.
lines.zh: 我给你们拍几张堆城堡的照片。

lines.en: This is the best vacation ever! I love the beach!
lines.zh: 这是最棒的假期！我爱海滩！

lines.en: We're glad you like it! Let's make more wonderful memories!
lines.zh: 我们很高兴你喜欢！让我们创造更多美好的回忆！
